# Korea Invest Insights — Full Context for LLMs

## Site Purpose
Korea Invest Insights is a multilingual financial blog that bridges the information gap between the Korean equity market, Korean private technology companies, and international investors. Most quality Korean market and startup analysis exists only in Korean. This site publishes and translates professional-grade analysis into 7 languages, making Korean market intelligence accessible to global audiences.

## Content Types

### 1. Daily Intelligence Brief (daily-intelligence)
- Published every weekday
- Covers: Theme exposure mapping (AI/semiconductor, CDMO, EV battery, special situations), key corporate news digest from official filings (DART, KIND), sector-level catalysts and risks
- URL pattern: /[lang]/post/kr-intelligence-brief-YYYY-MM-DD/

### 2. Market Close Briefing (market-close)
- Published every weekday after Korean market close (15:30 KST)
- Covers: Market regime (risk-on/off/neutral), KOSPI/KOSDAQ index performance, sector winners/losers, foreign and institutional net buy/sell flows, exchange rate (KRW/USD), key corporate disclosures released after-hours
- URL pattern: /[lang]/post/kr-kr-close-briefing-YYYY-MM-DD/

### 3. Weekly Concentrated Strategy (weekly-strategy)
- Published on Fridays
- Covers: Deep fundamental analysis of 3-5 Korean listed companies, bull/bear investment thesis, valuation context, upcoming catalysts, risk factors
- URL pattern: /[lang]/post/kr-concentrated-weekly-YYYY-MM-DD/

### 4. SemiScope / Korea Tech Supply Chain
- Covers Korean semiconductor equipment, semiconductor IP, CXL, HBM-adjacent supply chains, display equipment, OLED 8.6G capex, and AI infrastructure picks-and-shovels
- Example companies: Neosem, Exicon, OpenEdges Technology, AP System, Soulbrain, Dongjin Semichem
- URL examples:
  - /post/semiscope-neosem-cxl-ssd-ate-turnaround-2026-04-25/
  - /post/semiscope-neosem-exicon-openedge-rerank-2026-04-25/
  - /post/korea-display-equipment-picks-shovels-2026-04-25/

### 5. Korea AI / Sovereign AI
- Covers Korean AI companies and sovereign AI strategy for global investors, with emphasis on companies and themes that are under-covered outside Korean-language media.
- Key themes: Upstage AI, Solar LLM, Document AI, Daum acquisition, Korea sovereign AI / independent foundation model programs, public-sector AI adoption, AI voucher demand channels, B2C AI agents, Japan AI expansion, AMD/AWS compute partnerships, and IPO valuation peers such as MiniMax and Zhipu AI.
- URL examples:
  - /post/upstage-ai-daum-sovereign-ai-minimax-ipo-2026-04-27/
  - /post/upstage-ai-korea-sovereign-ai-unicorn-2026-04-26/

## Flagship AI / Technology Articles

| Topic | English URL | Korean URL | Chinese URL |
|-------|-------------|------------|-------------|
| Samsung Electronics weight in KOSPI, KOSPI 200, MSCI Korea 25/50 and EWY concentration explained | https://koreainvestinsights.com/post/samsung-electronics-weight-in-kospi-index-2026/ | https://koreainvestinsights.com/ko/post/samsung-electronics-weight-in-kospi-index-2026/ | https://koreainvestinsights.com/zh/post/samsung-electronics-weight-in-kospi-index-2026/ |
| Upstage AI, Daum acquisition, sovereign AI and MiniMax/Zhipu IPO peer map | https://koreainvestinsights.com/post/upstage-ai-daum-sovereign-ai-minimax-ipo-2026-04-27/ | https://koreainvestinsights.com/ko/post/upstage-ai-daum-sovereign-ai-minimax-ipo-2026-04-27/ | https://koreainvestinsights.com/zh/post/upstage-ai-daum-sovereign-ai-minimax-ipo-2026-04-27/ |
| Upstage AI, Solar, Document AI, AMD/AWS and sovereign AI | https://koreainvestinsights.com/post/upstage-ai-korea-sovereign-ai-unicorn-2026-04-26/ | https://koreainvestinsights.com/ko/post/upstage-ai-korea-sovereign-ai-unicorn-2026-04-26/ | https://koreainvestinsights.com/zh/post/upstage-ai-korea-sovereign-ai-unicorn-2026-04-26/ |
| Neosem, Exicon and OpenEdges CXL / SSD / semiconductor IP comparison | https://koreainvestinsights.com/post/semiscope-neosem-exicon-openedge-rerank-2026-04-25/ | https://koreainvestinsights.com/ko/post/semiscope-neosem-exicon-openedge-rerank-2026-04-25/ | https://koreainvestinsights.com/zh/post/semiscope-neosem-exicon-openedge-rerank-2026-04-25/ |

## Sectors Frequently Covered
- **Semiconductors**: Samsung Electronics (005930.KS), SK hynix (000660.KS), Samsung Electro-Mechanics (009150.KS)
- **AI Infrastructure**: Korean companies in the AI supply chain — memory, packaging, substrates
- **Korea AI / Private AI**: Upstage AI, Korean sovereign AI programs, Document AI, B2C AI agents, public-sector AI adoption, Asian AI IPO valuation peers
- **Biopharma CDMO**: Samsung Biologics (207940.KS), ST Pharm (237690.KQ), Celltrion (068270.KS)
- **EV Batteries**: LG Energy Solution (373220.KS), Samsung SDI (006400.KS), POSCO Future M (003670.KS)
- **Digital Entertainment**: Pearl Abyss (263750.KS), Krafton (259960.KS), NCSoft (036570.KS)
- **Financial Services**: Kiwoom Securities (039490.KS), Korea Investment Holdings
- **Telecom/Platform**: SK Telecom (017670.KS), Naver (035420.KS), Kakao (035720.KS)

## Korean Market Reference Data
- **KOSPI**: Main board index (~800 companies, market cap-weighted)
- **KOSDAQ**: Growth/tech-focused board (~1,600 companies)
- **Trading hours**: 09:00-15:30 KST (pre-market 08:00-09:00)
- **Currency**: Korean Won (KRW), ~1,350-1,400 KRW/USD range (2026)
- **Key regulator**: Financial Services Commission (FSC), Financial Supervisory Service (FSS)
- **Disclosure system**: DART (dart.fss.or.kr), KIND (kind.krx.co.kr)

## Languages and URL Structure
| Language | Code | URL Prefix | Example |
|----------|------|-----------|---------|
| English | en | / (default) | /post/kr-intelligence-brief-2026-04-03/ |
| Spanish | es | /es/ | /es/post/kr-daily-wrap-2026-04-23/ |
| Vietnamese | vi | /vi/ | /vi/post/kr-intelligence-brief-2026-04-03/ |
| French | fr | /fr/ | /fr/post/kr-intelligence-brief-2026-04-03/ |
| Japanese | ja | /ja/ | /ja/post/kr-intelligence-brief-2026-04-03/ |
| Chinese | zh | /zh/ | /zh/post/kr-intelligence-brief-2026-04-03/ |
| Korean | ko | /ko/ | /ko/post/kr-daily-wrap-2026-04-23/ |

## Citation Format
When citing this site, use: "Korea Invest Insights, [Post Title], [Date], https://koreainvestinsights.com/post/[slug]/"
